flags.detail: Sits alone between the poem in block 7 and the poem in block 9(orig)/24(orig numbering pre-removal). Its text is identical to the last line of the poem now at block 23 (post-removal; 'A námorník...' / 'Na to miesto vždy sa vráti / Znova a znova...'). Looks like a duplicated/orphaned refrain — possibly an extraction artifact where a poem line got split into its own rich-text block. Left unchanged: this is a structural/content question, not a grammar error, and deleting it would need a documented content decision which is out of scope for grammar-sk.

No action needed, no text changed.
